title: Pomodoro Method
description: Control work and break times by following a timer while working!

validation.focus-time: Focus time should be between 25 and about 60 minutes
validation.short-break: Short break time should be between 5 and about 25 minutes
validation.long-break: Long break time should be between 10 and about 40 minutes
validation.loops: Cycle should be between 2 and 10 times
